name: Panjit International Inc.
summary: Panjit International Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductors in China, North America, Germany, Korea, and internationally. It offers low/medium/high voltage MOSFETs; Schottky rectifiers and diodes; SiC Schottky barrier diodes; diode rectifiers; protection devices, such as Zener diodes, ESD protection devices, transient voltage suppressors, and load dump transient voltage suppressors; bipolar junction transistors; bridge rectifiers; and packing information solutions. Its products are used in automotive, industrial, and power supply applications. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
